      Select an itinerary and ending above. Hover or tap route stops for activities and dates.

      Route comparison

      The map changes dramatically, but the decision is concentrated in two windows: Austria versus Namibia before the wedding, and Greece versus Zimbabwe after it.

      Decision rule

      Option 3 narrowly leads when Namibia is a genuine priority and a comfortable lodge package plus no-UAE/no-Qatar flights work. Option 1 is the disciplined choice when pacing and recovery matter most. Option 2 should be selected only after the entire Nice → Victoria Falls → Boston flight chain is proven workable.

      South Korea versus Bali

      Both endings preserve seven nights in Japan: Tokyo 4 nights, Akiu Onsen 2 nights, and one final Tokyo/Narita night. The choice changes the final six days and the journey home.

      Ending rule

      Choose Korea unless Bali is a positive priority rather than simply “more warmth.” Korea gives six useful nights and the easiest flight home. Bali gives five tropical nights and the strongest contrast, but adds a one-stop 22–30 hour return and slightly more weather-transition risk.

      Planning basis
      Cash estimates are for two travelers, before Amex points, and include economy flights, midrange-to-better hotels, ground transport, food, activities and a planning reserve. Confirmed spend in the source report: $3,964.60. Prices are planning ranges rather than quotes.
